children.text: the adjusted share for each eligible county within the eligible State; by

the 50-percent adjusted share for the eligible county; by
the full funding amount for the fiscal year.

children.heading: Special rule for fiscal year 2014 payments
children.label: c Special rule for fiscal year 2014 payments

children.heading: State payment
children.label: 1 State payment
children.text: If an eligible county in a State that will receive a share of the State payment for fiscal year 2014 has already received, or will receive, a share of the 25-percent payment for fiscal year 2014 distributed to the State before , the amount of the State payment shall be reduced by the amount of that eligible county’s share of the 25-percent payment.April 16, 2015

children.heading: County payment
children.label: 2 County payment
children.text: If an eligible county that will receive a county payment for fiscal year 2014 has already received a 50-percent payment for that fiscal year, the amount of the county payment shall be reduced by the amount of the 50-percent payment.

children.heading: Special rule for fiscal year 2017 payments
children.label: d Special rule for fiscal year 2017 payments

children.heading: State payment
children.label: 1 State payment
children.text: If an eligible county in a State that will receive a share of the State payment for fiscal year 2017 has already received, or will receive, a share of the 25-percent payment for fiscal year 2017 distributed to the State before , the amount of the State payment shall be reduced by the amount of the share of the eligible county of the 25-percent payment.March 23, 2018

children.heading: County payment
children.label: 2 County payment
children.text: If an eligible county that will receive a county payment for fiscal year 2017 has already received a 50-percent payment for fiscal year 2017, the amount of the county payment shall be reduced by the amount of the 50-percent payment.

children.heading: Prompt payment
children.label: 3 Prompt payment
children.text: Not later than 45 days after , the Secretary of the Treasury shall make all payments under this subchapter for fiscal year 2017.March 23, 2018

children.heading: Special rule for fiscal year 2024 and 2025 payments
children.label: e Special rule for fiscal year 2024 and 2025 payments

children.heading: State payment
children.label: 1 State payment
children.text: If an eligible county in a State that will receive a share of the State payment for fiscal year 2024 or 2025 has already received, or will receive, a share of the 25-percent payment for that fiscal year distributed to the State before , the amount of the State payment shall be reduced by the amount of the share of the eligible county of the 25-percent payment.December 18, 2025

children.heading: County payment
children.label: 2 County payment
children.text: If an eligible county that will receive a county payment for fiscal year 2024 or 2025 has already received a 50-percent payment for that fiscal year, the amount of the county payment shall be reduced by the amount of the 50-percent payment.

children.heading: Prompt payment
children.label: 3 Prompt payment
children.text: Not later than 45 days after , the Secretary of the Treasury shall make all payments under this subchapter for each of fiscal years 2024 and 2025.December 18, 2025
